prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 62 名，近年排名稳定，属中上水平理工类高校；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音平台热度一般，未进入高热榜单，报考关注度相对平 稳；石油与天然气工程为传统王牌学科（第五轮评估 A+），化学工程与技术、安全科学与工程等学科实力突出，与该校主干招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等社会热门专业持续高 热，该校相关专业招生人数较少但竞争激烈；石油工程、油气储运等主干专业热度平稳；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 16.7 万，按近年比例估算物理类约 11.4 万人，较 2025 年物理类 11.74 万人略减约 3%，竞争略有缓和；该校位于北京，对黑龙江考生有一定地域吸引力，但本省招生计划占比不高，跨省竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近年小幅前移趋势、2026 年计划小幅缩招及本省物理类考生略减，供需两端基本平衡，在 2025 年基准 8497 名基础上预计位次略前移；预测最低位次约 8343 名，区间 7843–8843 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 9963→10727→8848→8902→8497, showing a fluctuating trend. After 2023, the ranking gradually moved forward, with a baseline of about 8497 in 2025. Provincial enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 73→78→80→79→76 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 74, a slight reduction of about 2.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering universities. The university's reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Douyin platform popularity is average, not entering the high-heat list, with relatively stable application attention. Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering is a traditional ace discipline (A+ in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), and disciplines such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering have outstanding strength, highly matching the university's main enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after, with limited enrollment in related majors but fierce competition. Core majors like Petroleum Engineering and Oil & Gas Storage and Transportation have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in the province is about 167,000, with an estimated 114,000 in Physics Category based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 3% from 117,400 in 2025, easing competition slightly. The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal to Heilongjiang candidates, but the provincial enrollment plan proportion is not high, and the cross-provincial competition pattern is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight forward trend of historical rankings in recent years, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, and the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in the province, supply and demand are basically balanced. Based on the 2025 baseline of 8497, the ranking is expected to move forward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8343, with a range of 7843–8843.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7843–8843, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 core majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 popular majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7843), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Petroleum Engineering (Carbon Neutral Energy Innovation Class) and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>8843), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety.
